name: seaglass
description: Connects Claude Desktop to your Seaglass memory layer so context flows across every AI tool you use.
long_description: Seaglass is a memory layer for people and teams of humans and AI agents. This connector runs the local `seaglass bridge` (stdio MCP ↔ HTTP), authenticating with the token cached by `seaglass auth login`. Requires the `seaglass` CLI on PATH.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Read memory: people, projects, topics, pages.
